title.ko: 안테나, 즉. 라디오 공중선(마이크로파 가열 용 라디에이터 또는 안테나 H05B 6/72)
title.en: ANTENNAS, i.e. RADIO AERIALS (radiators or antennas for microwave heating H05B0006720000)

definition.ko: 서브클래스 색인 H01Q7/00 안테나 유형 H01Q13/00 루프(loop) 형 H01Q9/00; 11/00 도파관형 기타 형; 짧은 것; 긴 것 H01Q15/00; 17/00 방사된 전파에 영향을 주는 장치 H01Q19/00 준광학적; 흡수 H01Q23/00 1차복사요소와 2차장치와의 조합 H01Q25/00 능동회로 또는 회로소자가 있는 안테나의 조합 H01Q21/00 2개 이상의 방사 패턴을 만들기 위한 구성 안테나 배열 또는 계 H01Q1/00; 3/00; 5/00 특수한 구성세부; 지향성; 상이한 주파수대에서의 동시동작

title.ko: 안테나의 세부 또는 안테나에 관련된 구성(지향 특성의 방향을 변경하기 위한 구성 H01Q3/00)
title.en: Details of, or arrangements associated with, antennas  (arrangements for varying orientation of directional pattern H01Q0003000000)

definition.ko: 1.이 그룹은 이하의 것만을 포함한다. 전기적 작용에 의하지 않는 안테나의 구조상의 세부 또는 특징; 하나 초과의 안테나 또는 안테나 소자에 적용할 수 있는 구조적 세부 또는 특징 특수형의 안테나나 안테나 요소에 관련되어 표현되거나, 그들에만 명확히 적용되는 구조상의 세부 혹은 특징은 그 형식에 대한 적절한 그룹으로 분류됨

title.en: Arrangements for de-icing; Arrangements for drying-out
Adaptation for subterranean or subaqueous use
Means for the lighting or illuminating of antennas, e.g. for purpose of warning

title.ko: 안테나 또는 그 부속품을 접기 위한 수단 (접을 수 있는 루프형 안테나 7/02; H 형 안테나 또는 야기(Yagi)식 안테나를 접기위한 수단 H01Q 19/04)
title.en: Means for collapsing antennas or parts thereof  (collapsible loop antennas H01Q0007020000;means for collapsing H-antennas or Yagi antennas H01Q0019040000)
Telescopic elements
Supports; Mounting means
for wire or other non-rigid radiating elements
Strainers, spreaders, or spacers
Means for stabilising antennas on an unstable platform
Resilient mountings
by structural association with other equipment or articles
with receiving set
with electric discharge tube

title.ko: 이동체상이나 그 내부에서 사용하는데 적합한 것(H01Q 1/08, H01Q 1/12, H01Q 1/18이 우선)
title.en: Adaptation for use in or on movable bodies (H01Q0001080000, H01Q0001120000, H01Q0001180000 take precedence)
Adaptation for use in or on aircraft, missiles, satellites, or balloons
Means for trailing antennas
Adaptation for use in or on road or rail vehicles

title.ko: 선박, 잠수함, 부표, 또는 어뢰 (수중 사용을 위한 것 H01Q 1/04)
title.en: Adaptation for use in or on ships, submarines, buoys or torpedoes (for subaqueous use H01Q0001040000)

title.ko: 복사기의 구성상의 형상, 예. 코운(cone) , 나선, 산상(H01Q 1/08, H01Q 1/14가 우선)
title.en: Structural form of radiating elements, e.g. cone, spiral, umbrella (H01Q0001080000, H01Q0001140000 take precedence)
formed by a conductive layer on an insulating support
Radiating elements coated with, or embedded in, protective material
Housings not intimately mechanically associated with radiating elements, e.g. radome

title.ko: 안테나로서 부가적으로 이용할 수 있도록 기타 주요기능이 있는 장치를 이용하는 것 (H01Q 1/27-H01Q 1/34 우선)
title.en: using equipment having another main function to serve additionally as an antenna  (H01Q0001270000-H01Q0001340000 take precedence)
Electric supply lines or communication lines
Earthing means; Earth screens; Counterpoises
Structural association of antennas with earthing switches, lead-in devices or lightning protectors

title.ko: 안테나간의 감결합수단; 안테나와 다른 구조간의 감쇠결합수단 (absorbing means H01Q 17/00)
title.en: Means for reducing coupling between antennas;  Means for reducing coupling between an antenna and another structure  (absorbing means H01Q0017000000)

title.ko: 안테나 또는 안테나계로부터 방사되는 전파의 지향특성의 방향 또는 형을 바꾸기 위한 구성
title.en: Arrangements for changing or varying the orientation or the shape of the directional pattern of the waves radiated from an antenna or antenna system
varying the shape of the antenna or antenna system
using mechanical movement of antenna or antenna system as a whole
for varying one co-ordinate of the orientation
over a restricted angle
for varying two co-ordinates of the orientation
to produce a conical or spiral scan
using mechanical relative movement between primary active elements and secondary devices of antennas or antenna systems
for varying the relative position of primary active element and a refracting or diffracting device
for varying relative position of primary active element and a reflecting device
wherein the primary active element is movable and the reflecting device is fixed
wherein the primary active element is fixed and the reflecting device is movable
varying the orientation in accordance with variation of frequency of radiated wave
varying the orientation by switching energy from one active radiating element to another, e.g. for beam switching

title.ko: 2개 이상의 복사소자간의 전력공급의 상대적 위상 또는 상대적 진폭을 바꾸는 것; 방사개구에 가하는 에너지 분포를 변경하는 것 (H01Q3/22, H01Q3/24 우선)
title.en: varying the relative phase or relative amplitude of energisation between two or more active radiating elements; varying the distribution of energy across a radiating aperture (H01Q0003220000, H01Q0003240000 take precedence)
varying the amplitude

title.ko: 위상을 바꾸는 것
title.en: varying the phase
by mechanical means

title.ko: 전기적인 수단에 의한 것(능동렌즈 또는 반사배열 H01Q 3/46)
title.en: by electrical means (active lenses or reflecting arrays H01Q0003460000)
with variable phase-shifters
the phase-shifters being digital
with phasing matrix
using frequency-mixing
varying the electric or magnetic characteristics of reflecting, refracting, or diffracting devices associated with the radiating element
Active lenses or reflecting arrays

title.ko: 2 또는 3 이상의 각기 다른 주파대에 안테나의 동시 작동을 위한 장치 (적합한 부품의 길이 H01Q 9/14 ; 예. 이중대역 또는 다중대역 장치 (다른 주파대에서 작동하는 또는 공통공급장치에 연결된 분리활성안테나장치의 결합 H01Q 21/30)
title.en: Arrangements for simultaneous operation of antennas on two or more different wavebands, e.g. dual-band or multi-band arrangements  (combinations of separate active antenna units operating in different wavebands and connected to a common feeder system H01Q0021300000)
Resonant antennas
for operation of centre-fed antennas comprising one or more collinear, substantially straight or elongated active elements
characterised by the operating wavebands
RF wavebands combined with non-RF wavebands, e.g. infrared or optical
Ultra-wideband [UWB] systems, e.g. multiple resonance systems; Pulse systems
Arrangements for establishing polarisation or beam width over two or more different wavebands

title.ko: 다른 파장대에서의 작동을 전송하기 위한 장치
title.en: Arrangements for providing operation on different wavebands

title.ko: 개별적 또는 쌍의 방사소자 (각 소자는 규명되지 않은 방식으로 전송되어짐)
title.en: Individual or coupled radiating elements, each element being fed in an unspecified way
using frequency dependent circuits or components, e.g. trap circuits or capacitors
within a radiating element or between connected radiating elements
between a radiating element and ground
at the feed, e.g. for impedance matching

title.ko: …다른 전파모드를 위한 것 (H01Q 5/314 takes precedence)
title.en: for different propagation modes (H01Q0005314000 takes precedence)
using two or more simultaneously fed points
using a single feed point
Creating multiple current paths
Branching current paths
Combination of fed elements with parasitic elements
Two or more parasitic elements
the parasitic elements having dual-band or multi-band characteristics

title.ko: 기와모양의 구조 또는 인터리브(interleaved) 구조 ; 결합되거나 전자기적 쌍을 이룬 장치, 예. 둘 이상의 끊어진 급진방사소자로 구성되어 있는 것
title.en: Imbricated or interleaved structures; Combined or electromagnetically coupled arrangements, e.g. comprising two or more non-connected fed radiating elements

title.ko: 둘 이상의 기와모양의 배열 (H01Q 5/49 우선)
title.en: using two or more imbricated arrays (H01Q0005490000 takes precedence)
using two or more feeds in association with a common reflecting, diffracting or refracting device
with a coaxial arrangement of the feeds
Combinations of two or more dipole type antennas
with parasitic elements used for purposes other than for dual-band or multi-band, e.g. imbricated Yagi antennas
Feeding or matching arrangements for broad-band or multi-band operation
for horn or waveguide antennas

title.ko: 루프의 주위에 균일한 전류분포를 가지고 또는 루프면과 직각면내에 지향특성을 가진 루프 안테나
title.en: Loop antennas with a substantially uniform current distribution around the loop and having a directional radiation pattern in a plane perpendicular to the plane of the loop
Collapsible antennas;  Retractable antennas

title.ko: 차폐된 안테나 (H01Q 7/02, H01Q 7/06 우선)
title.en: Screened antennas  (H01Q0007020000, H01Q0007060000 take precedence)

title.ko: 강자성체재료의 코어가 있는 것(H01Q 7/02가 우선)
title.en: with core of ferromagnetic material (H01Q0007020000 takes precedence)
Ferrite rod or like elongated core

title.ko: 2배 이하의 동작파장 범위를 가지며 도전성 능동방사소자로 구성된 전기적으로 짧은 안테나
title.en: Electrically-short antennas having dimensions not more than twice the operating wavelength and consisting of conductive active radiating elements
Non-resonant antennas

title.ko: 공진안테나
title.en: Resonant antennas

title.ko: 세부
title.en: Details
Junction boxes specially adapted for supporting adjacent ends of collinear rigid elements
Junction boxes specially adapted for supporting adjacent ends of divergent elements
adapted for adjustment of angle between elements

title.ko: 소자 또는 소자계의 길이가 조절될 수 있는 것 (텔레스코프소자 H01Q 1/10)
title.en: Length of element or elements adjustable (telescopic elements H01Q0001100000)

title.ko: 안테나의 양단간의 중간에 급전하는 것, 에. 중앙급전 다이폴(dipole)(H01Q 9/44가 우선)
title.en: with feed intermediate between the extremities of the antenna, e.g. centre-fed dipole  (H01Q0009440000 takes precedence)
Vertical disposition of the antenna

title.ko: 2개의 동일직선상에 있는 곧은 복사기; 곧은 1개의 복사기(H01Q 9/28가 우선)
title.en: Two collinear substantially straight active elements; Substantially straight single active elements (H01Q0009280000 takes precedence)
Rigid rod or equivalent tubular element or elements
Shunt feed arrangements to single active elements, e.g. for delta matching

title.ko: 반복소자 및 소자계가 있는 것 그 반복소자부분은 동작파장에 비해서 근소한 간격을 가지고 배치되는 것(공진루프안테나 H01Q 7/00)
title.en: with folded element or elements, the folded parts being spaced apart a small fraction of operating wavelength  (resonant loop antennas H01Q0007000000)
Spiral antennas

title.ko: 원추형, 원통형, 바구니(cage), 스트립, 거즈(gauze) 또는광대한 방사표면에 있는 소자; 동일직선상에 배치되고, 정부가 근접하고 또한 그 도전성 전송 선로에 의해서 급전되는 2개의 원추형표면을 구성하는 소자(도파관 혼(horn) 또는 개구 H01Q 13/00 ; 슬롯(slot)안테나 H01Q 13/00)
title.en: Conical, cylindrical, cage, strip, gauze or like elements having an extended radiating surface;  Elements comprising two conical surfaces having collinear axes and adjacent apices and fed by two-conductor transmission lines (waveguide horns or mouths H01Q0013000000;slot antennas H01Q0013000000)

title.ko: 늘려진 복사기의 단부에 급전점이 있는 것, 예, 유니폴(Unipole)(H01Q 9/44가 우선)
title.en: with feed to end of elongated active element, e.g. unipole (H01Q0009440000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 소자의 수직배치(H01Q 9/40이 우선)
title.en: Vertical arrangement of element (H01Q0009400000 takes precedence)
Mast, tower, or like self-supporting or stay-supported antennas
with top loading

title.ko: 카운터포이즈가 있는 것(복사소자와 동일평면상에 늘여진 소자로서 되는 카운터포이즈가 있는 것 H01Q 9/44)
title.en: with counterpoise (with counterpoise comprising elongated elements coplanar with the active element H01Q0009440000)
Element having extended radiating surface
with folded element, the folded parts being spaced apart a small fraction of the operating wavelength
Scimitar antennas

title.ko: 분기 직선 소자의 복수(plurality)를 가진 것, 예. V형 다이폴, X형 안테나; 직선 부분이 서로 상당히 기울어진 복수의 소자가 있는 것 ( 2이상의 능동소자의 조합 H01Q 21/00 ; 회전식 안테나 H01Q 21/26)
title.en: with a plurality of divergent straight elements, e.g. V-dipole, X-antenna; with a plurality of elements having mutually inclined substantially straight portions   (combinations of two or more active elements H01Q0021000000; turnstile antennas H01Q0021260000)
with rigid elements diverging from single point

title.ko: 2배 이상의 가장 짧은 동작파장 치수를 가지며 도전성 능동방자소자로 구성된 전기적으로 긴 안테나 (누수 도파 안테나 또는 슬롯 안테나 H01Q 13/00)
title.en: Electrically-long antennas having dimensions more than twice the shortest operating wavelength and consisting of conductive active radiating elements  (leaky-waveguide antennas or slot antennas H01Q0013000000)

title.ko: 비공명성 안테나, 예. 진행파(travelling-wave)안테나 (야기(Yagi) 안테나 H01Q 19/30)
title.en: Non-resonant antennas, e.g. travelling-wave antenna  (Yagi antennas H01Q0019300000)

title.ko: 안테나의 선택된 부분에 의해 원하는 방사선의 위상관계를 얻기 위해 구부러진, 접혀진, 모양이 있는, 가리워진(screened), 또는 전기적으로 장하된 부분을 갖는 것(H01Q 11/06-H01Q 11/10 우선)
title.en: with parts bent, folded, shaped, screened or electrically loaded to obtain desired phase relation of radiation from selected sections of the antenna  (H01Q0011060000-H01Q0011100000 take precedence)
Rhombic antennas;  V-antennas
Helical antennas

title.ko: 대수-주기 안테나 (H01Q 11/08 우선)
title.en: Log-periodic antennas  (H01Q0011080000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 공진안테나
title.en: Resonant antennas

title.ko: 안테나의 특정부분으로부터 방사하기 위해서 소망하는 위상관계를 얻기 위하여 또는 소망하는 편파효과를 얻기 위해서 구부러지고 반복되고, 형성되며 또는 차폐된 부분이 있는 또는 위상임피던스가 있는 것(H01Q 11/20 우선)
title.en: with parts bent, folded, shaped or screened or with phasing impedances, to obtain desired phase relation of radiation from selected sections of the antenna or to obtain desired polarisation effects  (H01Q0011200000 takes precedence)
in which the selected sections are collinear
in which the selected sections are parallelly spaced
V-antennas

title.ko: 도파관혼(horn) 또는 개구; 슬롯 안테나; 누설도파 안테나; 전송로에 따라서 방사를 일으키는 등기구성; 도파관혼(horn) 또는 개구; 슬롯 안테나; 누설도파 안테나; 전송로에 따라서 방사를 일으키는 등기구성
title.en: Waveguide horns or mouths;  Slot antennas;  Leaky-waveguide antennas;  Equivalent structures causing radiation along the transmission path of a guided wave

title.ko: 도파관혼(horns)
title.en: Waveguide horns

title.ko: 쌍원추형혼(동일직선상에 배치된 항부가 접근하고 또한 그 도체전송로에따라서 급전되는 2개의 원추상표면으로서 되는 쌍원추다이폴 H01Q 9/28)
title.en: Biconical horns (biconical dipoles comprising two conical surfaces having collinear axes and adjacent apices and fed by a two-conductor transmission line H01Q0009280000)

title.en: Resonant slot antennas
Longitudinally slotted cylinder antennas;  Equivalent structures
Skeleton cylinder antennas
Folded slot antennas

title.ko: 공진공동의 경계벽에 형성되고 지지된 슬롯 (축방향에 슬롯이 설치된 원통 H01Q 13/12)
title.en: the slot being backed by, or formed in boundary wall of, a resonant cavity (longitudinally slotted cylinder H01Q0013120000)

title.ko: 비공진누설파관 또는 전송선안테나; 전송로에 따라서 방사를 일으키는 등가구성
title.en: Non-resonant leaky-waveguide or transmission-line antennas;  Equivalent structures causing radiation along the transmission path of a guided wave
Longitudinal slot in boundary wall of waveguide or transmission line

title.ko: 유전체 또는 강자성체의 봉이나 관으로부터 되는 것(H01Q 13/28이 우선)
title.en: constituted by a dielectric or ferromagnetic rod or pipe (H01Q0013280000 takes precedence)
Surface waveguide constituted by a single conductor, e.g. strip conductor
comprising elements constituting electric discontinuities and spaced in direction of wave propagation, e.g. dielectric elements or conductive elements forming artificial dielectric

title.ko: 안테나로부터 방사된 전파를 반사, 굴절, 회절 또는 편파하기 위한 장치, 예. 광학유사장치 (지향성을 바꾸기 위한 가변수단 H01Q 3/00; 전파를 인도하기 위한 장치의 구성 H01P 3/20; 변조를 위한 가변수단 H03C 7/02)
title.en: Devices for reflection, refraction, diffraction or polarisation of waves radiated from an antenna, e.g. quasi-optical devices  (variable for purpose of altering directivity H01Q0003000000;arrangements of such devices for guiding waves H01P0003200000; variable for purpose of modulation H03C0007020000)
Refracting or diffracting devices, e.g. lens, prism
comprising wave-guiding channel or channels bounded by effective conductive surfaces substantially perpendicular to the electric vector of the wave, e.g. parallel-plate waveguide lens
comprising plurality of wave-guiding channels of different length
formed of solid dielectric material
comprising three-dimensional [3D] array of impedance discontinuities, e.g. holes in conductive surfaces or conductive discs forming artificial dielectric
functioning also as polarisation filter
Reflecting surfaces; Equivalent structures
curved in two dimensions [2D], e.g. paraboloidal
comprising plurality of mutually inclined plane surfaces, e.g. corner reflector
Collapsible reflectors
functioning also as polarisation filter
Combinations of reflecting surfaces with refracting or diffracting devices

title.ko: 분극장치 ; 분극필터(H01Q 15/12, H01Q 15/22우선)
title.en: Polarising devices; Polarisation filters (H01Q0015120000, H01Q0015220000 take precedence)
Devices for absorbing waves radiated from an antenna;  Combinations of such devices with active antenna elements or systems

title.ko: 안테나에 소망하는 지향특정을 부여하기 위하여 1차복사기와 2차장치, 예를 들면 광학유사장치가 있는 단위의 조합
title.en: Combinations of primary active antenna elements and units with secondary devices, e.g. with quasi-optical devices, for giving the antenna a desired directional characteristic

title.ko: 세부
title.en: Details

title.ko: H형-안테나나 야기안테나를 접기 위한 수단
title.en: Means for collapsing H-antennas or Yagi antennas

title.ko: 굴절이나 회절장치, 예를 들면 렌즈를 사용하는 것
title.en: using refracting or diffracting devices, e.g. lens
for modifying the radiation pattern of a radiating horn in which it is located

title.ko: 유전체 또는 자성체로 씌워지거나 내장되는 주요능동소자 (보호제 H01Q 1/40 ; 굴절 또는 회절장치의 다양한 전기 또는 자성적 성질을 가진 것 H01Q 3/44)
title.en: wherein the primary active element is coated with or embedded in a dielectric or magnetic material (protective material H01Q0001400000;varying the elecric or magnetic characteristics of refracting or diffracting devices H01Q0003440000)

title.ko: 반사표면을 사용하는 것
title.en: using reflecting surfaces

title.ko: 그 중에서 면이 오목한 것 (H01Q 19/18이 우선)
title.en: wherein the surfaces are concave (H01Q0019180000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 1차복사원이 1개의 복사기인 것 예. 1개의 다이폴(dipole), 1개의 슬롯, 1개의 도파관 종단(H01Q 19/15가 우선)
title.en: the primary radiating source being a single radiating element, e.g. a dipole, a slot, a waveguide termination (H01Q0019150000 takes precedence)
the primary radiating source being a line source, e.g. leaky waveguide antennas

title.ko: 1차복사원이 그 또는 그 이상의 복사기로 구성 되고 있는 것(H01Q 9/15, H01Q 25/00이 우선)
title.en: the primary radiating source comprising two or more radiating elements (H01Q0019150000, H01Q0025000000 take precedence)

title.ko: 2이상의 간격이 있는 반사면을 가진 것 (H01Q 19/20H01Q 19/21 우선)
title.en: having two or more spaced reflecting surfaces (H01Q0019200000 takes precedence)
wherein the surfaces are plane
comprising one main concave reflecting surface associated with an auxiliary reflecting surface
wherein a reflecting surface acts also as a polarisation filter or a polarising device
Producing pencil beam by two cylindrical focusing devices with their focal lines orthogonally disposed

title.ko: 1개의 강직한 도체소자로 형성된 2차장치를 사용하는 것
title.en: using a secondary device in the form of a single substantially straight conductive element

title.ko: 1차복사기가 중앙급전되고 또한 똑바로인 것, 예. H형안테나
title.en: the primary active element being centre-fed and substantially straight, e.g. H-antenna
the primary active element being end-fed and elongated

title.ko: 2개이상의 곧은 도체소자형에서 2차장치를 사용하는 것 (대수-주기 안테나 H01Q11/10; 반사면을 구성하는 것 H01Q19/10)
title.en: using a secondary device in the form of two or more substantially straight conductive elements  (log-periodic antennas H01Q0011100000;constituting a reflecting surface H01Q0019100000)
the primary active element being centre-fed and substantially straight, e.g. Yagi antenna
the primary active element being end-fed and elongated

title.ko: 안테나 배열 또는 시스템 (안테나 또는 안테나 시스템에서 방사된 파장의 지향성 패턴의 방향 또는 형태를 변화시키거나 다양화시키는 장치 H01Q 3/00)
title.en: Antenna arrays or systems  (arrangements for changing or varying the orientation or the shape of the directional pattern of the waves radiated from an antenna or antenna system H01Q0003000000)

title.ko: 동일방향으로 편파된 간격을 두고 배치된 개개로 여진된 안테나단위의 배열
title.en: Arrays of individually energised antenna units similarly polarised and spaced apart

title.ko: 직선방향에 따라서 또는 이 방향에 근접하여 배치된 단위
title.en: the units being spaced along, or adjacent to, a rectilinear path
Collinear arrangements of substantially straight elongated conductive units

title.ko: 직선으로 늘여진 도전단위의 평행배열 (교차하는 소자군을 포함한 전송선로로 구성된 진행파안테나, H01Q 11/02 ; 야기Yagi) 안테나H01Q 19/30)
title.en: Parallel arrangements of substantially straight elongated conductive units  (travelling-wave antennas comprising transmission line loaded with transverse elements H01Q0011020000;Yagi antennas H01Q0019300000)

title.ko: 애드콕(adcock)안테나
title.en: Adcock antennas
U-type

title.ko: H형의 것
title.en: H-type
the units being spaced along, or adjacent to, a curvilinear path
Antenna units of the array energised non-uniformly in amplitude or phase, e.g. tapered array or binomial array
Combinations of antenna units polarised in different directions for transmitting or receiving circularly and elliptically polarised waves or waves linearly polarised in any direction
Turnstile or like antennas comprising arrangements of three or more elongated elements disposed radially and symmetrically in a horizontal plane about a common centre
Combinations of substantially independent non-interacting antenna units or systems

title.ko: 소망하는 지향특성을 주기 위하여 이종의 공간적으로 결합된 안테나단위의 조합(H01Q 25/00이 우선)
title.en: Combinations of different interacting antenna units for giving a desired directional characteristic  (H01Q0025000000 takes precedence)
Combinations of separate antenna units operating in different wavebands and connected to a common feeder system
Antennas with active circuits or circuit elements integrated within them or attached to them

title.ko: 적어도 2개의 방사패턴을 만드는 안테나, 또는 안테나계 (지향을 변경 또는 지향특성의 형을 바꾸기 위한 구성 H01Q3/00)
title.en: Antennas or antenna systems providing at least two radiating patterns  (arrangements for changing or varying the orientation or the shape of the directional pattern H01Q0003000000)

title.ko: 가감(sum and difference)패턴을 제공하는 것(H01Q 25/04 우선)
title.en: providing sum and difference patterns (H01Q0025040000 takes precedence)
Multimode antennas
